description: Crisp, sweet, and slightly tart organic apples. Perfect for snacking or baking. Sold in 2lb bags.
Artisan-style sourdough loaf made with organic whole wheat flour and a natural starter.
High-protein, thick strained Greek yogurt. No added sugars. 32oz tub.
One dozen grade A large brown eggs from free-range chickens. Rich yolk and high protein.
Long-grain aromatic basmati rice, aged for flavor. Ideal for pilafs and curries.
Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil from Mediterranean olives. 750ml glass bottle.
Flash-frozen wild-harvested blueberries. No sugar added. Great for smoothies and pancakes.
6mm thick eco-friendly TPE yoga mat with alignment lines and superior grip.
Pair of dumbbells adjustable from 5 to 25 lbs. Includes storage tray.
Set of 5 latex resistance bands ranging from light to extra-heavy. Includes carrying bag.
Indoor/outdoor composite leather basketball. Size 7 (29.5 inches).
Lightweight 27-inch tennis racket for intermediate players. Includes head cover.
18-inch high-density foam roller for muscle recovery and physical therapy.
Leak-proof swimming goggles with UV protection and anti-fog coating.
5-quart jug of premium full synthetic motor oil for maximum engine protection.
Spin-on oil filter compatible with most modern sedan engines.
All-season beam-style wiper blade for clear visibility in rain and snow.
14oz aerosol spray to remove grease, oil, and brake dust from assemblies.
Ultra-soft microfiber mitt for scratch-free car washing.
Pure Brazilian Carnauba wax for a long-lasting, deep shine.
Digital tire pressure gauge with backlit display and LED nozzle.
100% combed cotton t-shirt in solid navy blue. Pre-shrunk for a perfect fit.
Classic dark-wash indigo jeans with a hint of stretch for comfort.
Pullover hooded sweatshirt with kangaroo pocket. Soft fleece lining.
Moisture-wicking polyester shorts with built-in liner and key pocket.
Pack of 3 pairs of charcoal grey dress socks. Reinforced heel and toe.
Thin nylon jacket with hood. Packable design for travel convenience.
Low-top lace-up sneakers with durable rubber sole. Unisex design.
